upstream_status.summary: Upstream advanced (anthropics/claude-code) but no commits touched our subpath; tracking refreshed.

customizations.reason: Upstream plugin documentation, dev-forge has its own docs

customizations.summary: Downgraded model/color to optional in SKILL.md (sections + summary table) and validate-agent.sh (warn instead of error); removed nonexistent test-agent-trigger.sh from script list; validate-agent.sh now invoked via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} path
customizations.reason: Working agents in this repo (forge-deep-review, forge-ui-forge) omit model/color and load fine; test-agent-trigger.sh never existed, even upstream; relative script paths break when the skill runs outside its own directory

customizations.summary: Replaced invented $IF() templating with prose conditionals in SKILL.md and references/plugin-features-reference.md; added inline bash-execution syntax spec replacing a dangling reference pointer; added User Interaction Patterns section pointing to references/interactive-commands.md; closing reference list now enumerates all 7 reference files
customizations.reason: Claude Code has no $IF() substitution (real substitutions: $ARGUMENTS, $1-$9, @file, !`cmd`); the referenced bash-execution section did not exist; interactive-commands.md was orphaned despite the skill description triggering on AskUserQuestion

customizations.summary: Wrapped the Plugin Hook Configuration example in the required {"hooks": {...}} wrapper; fixed 'security-guidance plugin' pointer to forge-security
customizations.reason: Example contradicted the skill's own plugin hooks.json format spec; no security-guidance plugin exists in this marketplace — the vendored equivalent is forge-security

customizations.summary: Wrapped hooks.json example in {"hooks": {...}}; replaced fictional agent frontmatter (capabilities list, missing name) with the real schema (name, description, optional tools/model/color); removed unsupported 'name' field from the command frontmatter example
customizations.reason: Examples showed invalid schemas that would mislead plugin authors; command frontmatter does not support 'name' per command-development's frontmatter-reference

customizations.summary: Fixed 'cc --plugin-dir' to 'claude --plugin-dir' in the plugin testing example
customizations.reason: cc is the C compiler; the Claude Code CLI binary is claude

customizations.summary: Fixed 'cc --plugin-dir' to 'claude --plugin-dir' in the local testing instructions

Rewrote Restart Requirement section and its echoes (SKILL.md plus examples/create-settings-command.md and examples/example-settings.md) to distinguish hooks.json structure changes (require restart) from settings-file values (read per hook invocation, apply immediately)
customizations.reason: Skill contradicted itself — blanket 'settings changes require restart' claims versus the hot-toggle pattern it sells; reality is only hooks.json structure changes need a restart

customizations.summary: Added post-frontmatter origin attribution comments (Curated from anthropics/claude-code/plugins/plugin-dev/skills/<dir> · Anthropic Commercial Terms) to all 7 skills
customizations.reason: Repo convention (.claude/rules/plugin-authoring.md): externally curated skills note origin at top of SKILL.md; backfill from the 2026-06-09 skill review (Wave 4)
